{{C|Flame Barrier||2}} is a 2 {{Icon|IE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Uncommon&color:Ironclad|Uncommon|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill&color:Ironclad|Skill|2}} Card for the {{KW|Ironclad||2}}.

Despite {{BD|Flame Barrier||2}}'s language being slightly different from that of {{BD|Thorns||2}}, the two effects are functionally identical.
== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
*{{BD|Flame Barrier||2}} is most advantageous when {{KW|Block|Blocking|2}} multi-hit {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}}.
===Neutral===
*Because {{BD|Flame Barrier||2}} only triggers from ''{{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}}'', it does not trigger due to:
**Damage inflicted by cards (such as {{C|Bloodletting||2}}, {{C|Burn||2}}, or {{C|Regret||2}}).
**{{BD|Constrict||2}}
**{{BD|Galvanic||2}}
